entries.note: V55-C continues to consume admissions, reports, registers, drift records, evidence refs, and explicit structured descendant declarations only.
The admitted six-artifact seed set remains closed in V55-C with no thematic or companion widening.
V55-C preserves the inherited warning-only checker family posture and does not alter live gating behavior.
V55-C consumes the shipped V55-A/V55-B checker, report, and unresolved surfaces by default without silently forking them.
V55-C adds one bounded advisory governance calibration register and one bounded advisory migration decision register over the unchanged predicate and surface family.
